pullRequest.title: [DOM-55394] Refactored tests to click on selected kebab button

nodes.body: Could you make these two steps a little more consistent in language? One says `EDV admin` and the other says `Admin EDV`. Either one works for me.

```suggestion
def wait_to_click_unregister_link_step_on_nexus(ctx, edv_name):
```
We're trying to use "Nexus" instead of "Hybrid" nowadays.
